description_long: This object is a classic double-barrel shotgun featuring a wooden full stock and a pair of parallel barrels finished in a dark, likely blued, metal. The barrels are side-by-side, with a smooth, unvented rib running along the top, and the break-action hinge is visible at the receiver. The stock is crafted from polished wood, showing a natural grain and a slightly curved shoulder rest. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, encasing a single visible trigger. The fore-end is also wooden, matching the stock, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for hunting or sport shooting. The finish is a mix of matte and glossy, with the wood appearing smooth and the metal parts reflecting more light.
description: A side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a polished wooden stock and dark metal barrels, featuring a rounded trigger guard and break-action design.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, side-by-side barrels, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: The front view displays the twin barrel openings and the narrow profile of the shotgun, emphasizing the side-by-side configuration.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden stock, break-action receiver, and the metallic barrels.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrels, with the trigger guard barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
